description: Industry equivalence classes for Tier 1 industry-match fallback. A lead's industry passes the ICP industry check if it's either in the ICP's allowed list OR in the SAME equivalence class as any allowed industry. Construction is NOT listed — it's a sub-industry already mapped to 'Real Estate' parent in INDUSTRY_TAXONOMY, so a lead with industry='Real Estate' + sub_industry='Construction' already matches without any equivalence rule. These classes only apply at the parent-industry level. Each class is bidirectional and an industry MAY appear in multiple classes (transitive matches are intentional, e.g., Software ≈ IT also makes Software ≈ Security via the second class).
